offer: For construction foremen processing 5–10 projects/week, inefficient tracking causes delays in project timelines. We provide weekly progress and materials usage reports instead of manual reporting and spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to track materials usage and project progress in real-time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction foremen
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction foremen with demo video
Community forums where foremen share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for materials usage and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
